title: Short title
doc_html:
PART II. FEDERALLY QUALIFIED HEALTH CENTER

PRESERVATION ACT

§1183.1. Short title

            This Part may be cited as the "Federally Qualified Health Center Preservation Act".

            Acts 1997, No. 1473, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.131 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
